title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: Five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations and token waste in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardians as code-based rules, and runtime guardrails for agent self-correction. Demonstrated on a travel agent built with Strands Agents, with integration patterns shown in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.
